summary: REQ-1 is clearly addressed for UploadProgressStatus via truncation/min-w-0. The diff summary claims mobile-responsive filename handling on CreatePastePage and PasteViewPage plus cohesive theming/polish (REQ-2/REQ-3). However, several non-requested functional changes appear (paste ID normalization, download filename inference, new upload progress 'preparing' stage, and error handling changes).

hallucinated_features.description: Added paste ID validation/normalization utilities and route extraction behavior (handling legacy numeric IDs, trimming, URL decoding, removing query strings/fragments, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on UI polish and mobile filename overflow; it does not request changing routing/paste ID parsing/validation behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed file download behavior to infer extensions, normalize filenames, and use Object URLs with delayed cleanup to prevent mobile generic filenames.
hallucinated_features.reason: Non-goal states not to change paste/file storage behavior; while this is frontend-side, it is still a behavior change not requested by REQ-1/2/3 (which are presentational/mobile layout).

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced upload progress tracking by adding a new 'preparing' stage before upload begins.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2/REQ-3 require UI/UX polish without functionality changes; adding a new upload stage is new behavior beyond the requested responsive/theming work.

hallucinated_features.description: Added remaining-time formatting utility and updated paste view to present expiry with new formatting logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in REQ-1/2/3 (which focus on filename overflow and visual polish/theme). This introduces new display/formatting behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified error handling behavior on PasteViewPage to distinguish expired/not-found vs network/initialization errors and provide retry.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; beyond presentational polish and could be considered new behavior (new retry flow).
evidence: frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx (conditional error type handling and onRetry/refetch)

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced/centralized file size limit configuration (50MB) in a new config module.
Added a branded footer link and 'Built with ♥ using caffeine.ai' content.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; this is additional product/content change beyond UI polish requirements.
